ddls:
CREATE TABLE "remodels" (
  "remodel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each remodel event */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being remodeled */,
  "remodel_year" INTEGER /* Year when the remodel took place */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the remodel work done */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the remodel */,
  "contractor_name" TEXT /* Name of the contractor who performed the remodel */,
  "contractor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contractor (if applicable) */,
  "permit_number" TEXT /* Permit number for the remodel */,
  "permit_date" TEXT /* Date the permit was issued */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the remodel was completed */,
  "inspector_name" TEXT /* Name of the inspector who approved the remodel */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date the remodel was inspected */,
  "remodel_status" TEXT /* Status of the remodel (e.g., Completed, In Progress, Approved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("remodel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_history" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale record */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property sold */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price at which the property was sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "buyer_name" TEXT /* Name of the buyer */,
  "seller_name" TEXT /* Name of the seller */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the real estate agent involved in the sale */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission paid to the agent */,
  "closing_date" TEXT /* Date the sale was closed */,
  "sale_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the property at the time of sale (e.g., As-Is, Repaired) */,
  "financing_type" TEXT /* Type of financing used (e.g., Cash, Mortgage) */,
  "loan_amount" REAL /* Amount of the loan, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district (e.g., Murray, Henley) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of district (e.g., Elementary, Middle, High) */,
  "district_website" TEXT /* URL of the district's official website */,
  "district_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the district (e.g., on a scale of 1-10) */,
  "student_population" INTEGER /* Number of students in the district */,
  "principal_name" TEXT /* Name of the principal or head of the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Manager, Agent) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string of user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the property */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the property was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the property */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the action performed (e.g., Viewed property details, Edited property value) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
